display.purpose: Rare app-level emphasis only; not for marketing-style hero sections.

headline.purpose: Screen titles and primary section headers.

title.purpose: Cards, modals, row names, and compact panel headings.

body.purpose: Thai operational copy, helper text, and table secondary data.

label.purpose: Buttons, badges, form labels, tabs, and compact controls.

shadows.name: surface-ring
shadows.value: ring: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent)
shadows.purpose: Default card and container boundary without decorative elevation.

shadows.name: overlay-medium
shadows.value: box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); ring: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent)

shadows.name: overlay-high
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and sheets that temporarily own attention.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Dialog opacity, overlay changes, and fast state transitions.

motion.name: panel-standard
motion.purpose: Sheet movement and larger panel transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button for save, add, and commit workflows.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M19 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11l5 5v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M17 21v-8H7v8M7 3v5h8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg>บันทึก</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font: 500 14px/1 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, transform 150ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary), transparent 20%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button for cancel, export, and alternate controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); font: 500 14px/1 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, color 150ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: .5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Compact text input used for purchase rows, search, budget, and member forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: var(--foreground); font: 500 14px/1 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-width: 0; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--input); border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); font: 400 14px/1.5 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease-in-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: .5; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--input), transparent 50%); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: A compact information card for dashboard, reports, budgets, and member summaries.
components.html:

components.css: .ds-card { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--card); color: var(--foreground); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground), transparent 90%); font-family: 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-label { margin: 0 0 6px; color: var(--muted-foreground); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card-value { display: block; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card-helper { margin: 10px 0 0; color: var(--muted-foreground); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card-icon { display: inline-flex; width: 40px; height: 40px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary), transparent 70%); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary), white 88%); color: var(--primary); font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Secondary Badge
components.description: Neutral metadata badge for status, source, and category labels.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: fit-content; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--secondary); color: var(--secondary-foreground); font: 500 12px/1 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); }

components.name: Operational Table
components.description: Desktop comparison pattern for purchase summaries, stock, and budgets.
components.html:
#ชื่อวัตถุดิบปริมาณราคารวม
1ไข่ไก่เบอร์ 538 ฟอง฿76
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; caption-side: bottom; color: var(--foreground); font: 400 14px/1.5 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table th { height: 40px; padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); text-align: left; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table td { padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table tr:hover td { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted), transparent 50%); } .ds-table .num { text-align: right; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation Item
components.description: Mobile-first module navigation with icon and short Thai label.
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: inline-flex; min-width: 64px; min-height: 64px; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); font: 500 12px/1.2 'Noto Sans Thai', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-in-out, color 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-bottom-nav svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; } .ds-bottom-nav[aria-current='page'] { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary), white 90%); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-bottom-nav:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring), transparent 50%); }

narrative.overview:
EasyReceipt is a restrained product UI for people doing real operational work: recording purchases, checking stock, planning recipes, controlling branch budgets, and managing access. The system should feel like a calm control desk beside the kitchen workflow: clear enough for staff, precise enough for managers, and light enough to use on a phone without thinking about the interface.

The visual language is practical and compact. It uses a cool near-white workspace, white surfaces, a deep muted blue primary action color, and semantic status tints for stock, purchase, warning, budget, and role states. It explicitly rejects the PRODUCT.md anti-references: complex UI, corporate-heavy dashboards, overloaded dashboard decoration, dense admin clutter, excessive color, unnecessary cards, ornamental effects, and interactions that slow down kitchen or purchasing workflows.
keyCharacteristics: Mobile-first operational density with readable Thai text and large enough touch targets.
Restrained color: one primary blue for action and current selection, semantic tints only when they carry state.
Familiar product patterns: tables, cards, tabs, modals, bottom navigation, badges, and search fields.
Flat-by-default surfaces with borders/rings for structure and shadows only for overlays.
Role-aware clarity: controls should match Owner, Manager, staff, and viewer responsibilities.

rules.name: The State Color Earns Its Place Rule
rules.body: Color must explain a state, category, role, or action. Never add color merely to decorate a dashboard card.

rules.name: The Primary Is Rare Rule
rules.body: Control Blue should stay uncommon on a screen. Use it for the one next action, not every clickable element.

rules.name: The Thai Readability Rule
rules.body: Do not shrink Thai helper text below 12px, and do not use negative letter spacing. Dense screens are acceptable; cramped Thai is not.

rules.name: The Product Scale Rule
rules.body: Use fixed product UI sizes, not fluid hero type. The interface is a tool, not a landing page.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Floating Rule
rules.body: If an element sits in the normal page flow, use a border or tonal layer. If it floats above content, use a shadow.

rules.name: The No Ghost Cards Rule
rules.body: Do not pair decorative wide shadows with thin borders on ordinary cards. It makes the product feel heavier than the work.

dos: Do keep the interface simple, professional, and easy to use; this is the brand personality from PRODUCT.md.
Do make budget and stock consequences visible at the moment of action.
Do use Control Blue for primary actions and current selection.
Do use semantic tints for warning, low stock, ready, saved, draft, and role states.
Do keep mobile purchase and stock workflows touch-friendly and compact.
Do use existing shadcn/Base UI primitives and lucide icons before inventing controls.
Do prefer tables for desktop comparison and compact rows for mobile scanning.
donts: Don't make the UI feel complex, corporate-heavy, or overloaded with dashboard decoration.
Don't create dense admin clutter, excessive color, unnecessary cards, ornamental effects, or interactions that slow down kitchen or purchasing workflows.
Don't use marketing-page tropes: oversized hero type, decorative gradients, glass panels, or repeated icon-card grids.
Don't use color as decoration. If it does not communicate state, action, role, or category, remove it.
Don't hide important Owner/Manager controls behind ambiguous icons without tooltips or labels.
Don't let mobile text overflow buttons, table cells, or cards; Thai labels must wrap or resize cleanly.
Don't make ordinary cards float with large shadows. Use borders and tonal layers first.
